rules.description:
You start the battle with three Flux tokens (we recommend using a dice to track how many Flux tokens you have). You can spend one Flux token just after an 突進擲骰, 命中擲骰, 致傷擲骰, 傷害 roll, saving throw or 危險 test is made for a LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH model or LEGIONES DAEMONICA TZEENTCH unit 你軍隊中的 to 重擲 the 結果為 that roll, throw or test. Flux tokens can also be spent to enhance the effect of some 策略. 每當 you spend a Flux token, reduce the number of Flux tokens you have by one and your opponent gains one Flux token. 


 Whenever your opponent has one or more Flux tokens, they can spend one Flux token after an 突進擲骰, 命中擲骰, 致傷擲骰 or saving throw is made for a model or unit from their army, to 重擲 the 結果為 that roll or throw. If they do, they reduce the number of Flux tokens they have by one and you gain one Flux token. This is ignored if your opponent has the Fates in Flux 分遣隊 rule. 


In your 指揮階段, if your opponent has one or more Flux tokens, you gain one Flux token. 


**Designer’s Note**: *When using fast dice rolling, this rule can be used to spend any number of Flux tokens (up to the amount you have), to 重擲 a number of dice up to the amount spent, after rolling multiple rolls or saving throws at once.*

rules.description: 每當 an 敵方單位 (excluding AIRCRAFT) ends a Normal or Advance move 6 吋內 of one or more LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE units 你軍隊中的, one of those LEGIONES DAEMONICA KHORNE units can make a Surge move towards that 敵方單位. To do so, 擲一顆 D6: models in 你的單位 move a number of inches up to this result, but 你的單位 must end that move as close as possible to that 敵方單位. When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement 射程 of that 敵方單位. A unit cannot make a Surge move while it is within Engagement 射程 of one or more 敵方單位.

sharedRules.description:
If your Army 陣營 is LEGIONES DAEMONICA, certain areas of the battlefield are considered to be within your army’s Shadow of 混沌, as follows: 
■ Your deployment zone is always within your army’s Shadow of 混沌.
■ At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the 目標標記 within No Man’s Land, until the end of that phase, No Man’s Land is within your army’s Shadow of 混沌.
■ At the start of any phase, if you control at least half of the 目標標記 within 對手的 deployment zone, until the end of that phase, 對手的 deployment zone is within your army’s Shadow of 混沌.

DAEMONIC MANIFESTATION
While a LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit 你軍隊中的 is within your army’s Shadow of 混沌, 每當 該單位 takes a 戰鬥震懾 test, add 1 to that test and, if that test is passed, one model in 該單位 regains up to D3 lost wounds (if 該單位 is a BATTLELINE unit and that test is passed, up to D3 destroyed models can be returned to 該單位 instead).

DAEMONIC TERROR
While an 敵方單位 is within your army’s Shadow of 混沌 and/or it is 6 吋內 of one or more BLOODTHIRSTER, GREAT UNCLEAN ONE, KAIROS FATEWEAVER, KEEPER OF SECRETS, LORD OF CHANGE, ROTIGUS, SHALAXI HELBANE or SKARBRAND units 你軍隊中的, 每當 該單位 takes a 戰鬥震懾 test, subtract 1 from that test and, if that test is failed, that 敵方單位 suffers D3 點致命傷.
